title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.143 - Rulemaking authority
text:
375.143.  Rulemaking authority. — In order to effectuate and aid in the interpretation of section 375.141, the director, under section 374.045, may adopt rules and regulations codifying professional standards of producer competency and trustworthiness in the handling of applications, premium funds, conflicts of interest, record keeping, supervision of others, and customer suitability.
(L. 2007 S.B. 66)
